sprout_pulse.name: Sprout Pulse
sprout_pulse.description: Release a gentle regenerative pulse that restores stability gradually.

groundbind_step.name: Groundbind Step
groundbind_step.description: Anchor yourself with a grounding step that resists disruption and slows the target.

verdant_lash.name: Verdant Lash
verdant_lash.description: Strike with a lash of living energy that may bind the target momentarily.

bloom_surge.name: Bloom Surge
bloom_surge.description: Surge with verdant growth, enhancing both offensive and mental strength.

rootweave_guard.name: Rootweave Guard
rootweave_guard.description: Weave a protective lattice of living energy that strengthens defense and regeneration.

entangle_thread.name: Entangle Thread
entangle_thread.description: Send out a binding thread that slows the target and weakens their next move.

life_spiral.name: Life Spiral
life_spiral.description: Channel a spiral of life energy that heals and strengthens resistance.

growth_cascade.name: Growth Cascade
growth_cascade.description: Trigger a cascading growth effect that increases power each turn.

verdancy_break.name: Verdancy Break
verdancy_break.description: Break through harmful effects with a burst of verdant clarity, restoring stability.

special.name: SPECIAL
special.description: A hidden Root technique reserved for future awakening.
